text_anchor: The columns are using vertical stacking instead of horizontal layout; they should be in a row.
positive_node: <div className="h-full flex-col p-6 gap-6 min-w-max">

text_anchor: The footer elements are aligned to the left instead of being distributed between left and right sides.
positive_node: <div className="flex items-center mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-50">

text_anchor: The assignee stack has excessive negative margin causing overflow beyond the card boundary.
positive_node: <div className="flex -space-x-2 overflow-hidden -m-4">

text_anchor: The task title has forced single-line text truncation with a narrow maximum width, cutting off content.
positive_node: <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-snug group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap max-w-28">

text_anchor: The vertical spacing between cards is excessively large, causing overlapping elements and layout issues.
positive_node: <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100/50 rounded-xl p-2 border border-gray-100/50 flex flex-col gap-9 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">

text_anchor: The search input has an extremely narrow width constraint, making the placeholder text and input area barely visible.
positive_node: <input type="text" placeholder="Search tasks..." className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 w-16 transition-all" />

text_anchor: The sidebar width is severely constrained to a minimal value, causing all content to be hidden or crushed.
positive_node: <aside className="activity-sidebar w-12 bg-white border-l border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full flex-shrink-0 absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-0 md:relative shadow-xl md:shadow-none">

text_anchor: The mobile overlay backdrop is completely transparent instead of semi-transparent, making it invisible.
positive_node: <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-transparent backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setIsSidebarOpen(false)}>

text_anchor: I can't see the search bar or controls because they get covered by the kanban board when scrolling.
positive_node: <header className="board-header bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 sticky top-0 z-0">

text_anchor: I cannot access the activity feed on my phone because it's blocked by the main content.
positive_node: <aside className="activity-sidebar w-12 bg-white border-l border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full flex-shrink-0 absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-0 md:relative shadow-xl md:shadow-none">

text_anchor: I have to scroll down repeatedly to see each task column, making it impossible to compare tasks across boards.
positive_node: <div className="h-full flex-col p-6 gap-6 min-w-max">

text_anchor: The assignee avatars are stuck next to the comments count, making the card look cluttered and hard to read.
positive_node: <div className="flex items-center mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-50">

text_anchor: I can't see the profile images clearly as they're cut off or partially hidden outside the task card.
positive_node: <div className="flex -space-x-2 overflow-hidden -m-4">

text_anchor: I cannot read the full task names because they're truncated to just a few characters.
positive_node: <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 leading-snug group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap max-w-28">

text_anchor: The cards are stacking awkwardly with too much space, making some cards invisible or overlapped.
positive_node: <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100/50 rounded-xl p-2 border border-gray-100/50 flex flex-col gap-9 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar">

text_anchor: I cannot see or use the search field effectively because it's shrunk to an unusable size.
positive_node: <input type="text" placeholder="Search tasks..." className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 w-16 transition-all" />

text_anchor: The activity feed sidebar is unusable because it's too narrow to display any text or information.
positive_node: <aside className="activity-sidebar w-12 bg-white border-l border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full flex-shrink-0 absolute right-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-0 md:relative shadow-xl md:shadow-none">

text_anchor: I can't tell if the sidebar modal is actually open because there's no visual feedback or dimming of the background.
positive_node: <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-transparent backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setIsSidebarOpen(false)}>

text_anchor: The header keeps sliding behind the banner when scrolling down.
positive_node: <header className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-terra-200">

text_anchor: The plant name tags are hidden under the image.
positive_node: <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex flex-col gap-2 z-0">

text_anchor: The plants are showing in one long column instead of multiple columns.
positive_node: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-1 gap-6">

text_anchor: The sustainability badges are stacking vertically on the screen.
positive_node: <div className="flex flex-col justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16 text-terra-800">

text_anchor: The company name in the footer is enormous and doesn't fit.
positive_node: Terra Flora

text_anchor: The care tips are impossible to read—they're too small and faded.

text_anchor: The main content section is overlapping the banner area.

text_anchor: Plant card text is cramped against the edges.

text_anchor: The banner text is hard to read—it blends into the background image.

text_anchor: There's a floating button below the plant cards that shouldn't be there.
